title: OC 151 UPI AUTOPAY AFA limit enhancement and compliance
text:
Ne

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC No. 151/2022-23 June 23, 2022

To,

All Members — Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Subject: UPI AUTOPAY AFA limit enhancement and compliance
Dear Sir/Madam,

UPI AUTOPAY (referred to as e-mandate for recurring payments) was launched on 22"4 July
2020. The functionality is now supported by major banks and is already being used by merchants for
major categories such as Subscriptions, Bill Payments, Investments, Insurance Payments, Donations,
Wallet Top-up, etc.

2. For enhanced customer experience and performance, all UPI Apps and Merchants to
mandatorily enable Intent and QR flow for UPI AUTOPAY mandate registration. UPI Apps and
Merchants which are already live on UP! AUTOPAY shall enable Intent and QR by 30"
September 2022. NPCI circular UPI/OC-142/2021-22 to be adhered by merchants for
interoperability and standardization of acceptance of UP! payments.

3. For every UPI AUTOPAY mandate registration, pre-debit notification, execution, modification,
pause, unpause and revoke transactions, Payer App and Issuer bank shall send standard
SMS/ Notification to the user, listed in Annexure A.

4. A reference is invited to Circular RBI/2022-23/73 CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S-518/02.14.003/2022-
23 issued by Reserve Bank of India, dated 16"" June 2022 with the subject “Processing of e-
mandates for recurring transactions’. The said circular mentions the enhancement of the
Additional Factor of Authentication (AFA) limit from %5,000/- to 215,000/- per transaction.

In line with the aforementioned RBI circular, UPI AUTOPAY AFA (viz. UPI PIN) limit has been
enhanced from %5,000/- to 15,000/- per transaction, with immediate effect.

i. Payer Apps shall capture UPI PIN as an AFA, if the UPI AUTOPAY execution
amount is more than 715,000/-, whereas process the execution without AFA for

the transaction amount less than or equal to =15,000/-.

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10° Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E}, Mumbai 400 051.
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN: U7499O0MH2008NPL189067


NEC)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

ii. In addition to point 1, Issuer Banks shall validate Digital Signature (DS) and UP]
PIN for execution amount more than 715,000/-. For execution amount less than or
equal to 315,000/- Issuer Bank shall process the execution basis the DS only.

iii. | AFA shall not be required for the 1% execution happening immediately (within 5
mins) of mandate creation for amount less than or equal to 15,000/-.

Members are hereby requested to take note of the above and ensure compliance.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia

Chief of Products

JOO1A, The Capital, B Wing, 10% Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E}, Mumbai 400 057-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
